violations.description: CONTAMINATION FROM WIPING CLOTHS (2 pts): Wiping cloths noted laying on counter in food prep area.
PREMISES (1 pts): Mops and brooms not hung.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Walkin cooler fan guards noted needs cleaning
TOILET FACILITIES (1 pts): Toilet room doors noted not self closing.
SANITIZATION OF EQUIP. AND UTENSILS (4 pts): An inadequate amount of chlorine sanitizer was noted in the final rinse of the dish machine. No sanitizer present or coming out of fill tube.
CONTAMINATION BY EMPLOYEES (3 pts): Bare hand contact with ready to eat food noted not being avoided when plating food.
CONTAMINATION FROM WIPING CLOTHS (2 pts): Wiping cloths noted laying on counter in food prep area.
EMPLOYEE PRACTICES (1 pts): A personal beverage was observed in an improper container. No lids
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Walls around dish machine and ceiling and walls around portable fan and ventss noted in need of cleaning.
